title: Idhayathai Yedho Ondru Lyrics Yennai Arindhaal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Idhayathai Yedho Ondru Song Lyrics From Yennai Arindhaal
Singers: Chinmayi

Idhayaththai yedho ondru
Ilukkudhu konjam indru
Idhuvarai idhu pole naanum illaye.

Kadala alai pole vandhu
Karaigalai allum ondru
Moolgida manadhum pin
 vaangavillaye.

Iruppadhu oru manadhu
Idhuvarai adhu enadhu.
Enai vittu medhuvaai adhu
Poga kandaeney.

Idhu oru kanavu nilai
Kalaithida virumbavillai.
Kanavukkul kanavaai
Ennai naaney kandeney.

Enakenna venum endru
Oru vaarththei kelu nindru.
Ini neeyum naanum ondru
Ena sollum naalum endru.(2)

Malargalai alli vandhu
Magizhvudan kaiyyil thandhu.
Manadhinai pagirndhidave
Aasai kolgindren.

Thaduppadhu ennavendru
Thavikkudhu nenjam indru.
Nadhiyinil ilaiyena naan
Thoindhu selginren.

Oru velli kolusu pola
Indha manasu sinungum keela.
Aniyaadha vairam pola
Pudhu naanam minungum Mela.(2)

Idhayaththai yedho ondru
Ilukkudhu konjam indru
Idhuvarai idhu pole naanum illaye.

Kadala alai pole vandhu
Karaigalai allum ondru
Moolgida manadhum pin
 vaangavillaye.

Iruppadhu oru manadhu
Idhuvarai adhu enadhu.
Enai vittu medhuvaai adhu
Poga kandaeney.

Idhu oru kanavu nilai
Kalaithida virumbavillai.
Kanavukkul kanavaai
Ennai naaney kandeney.

Oru velli kolusu pola
Indha manasu sinungum keela.
Aniyaadha vairam pola
Pudhu naanam minungum Mela

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Idhayathai Yedho Ondru?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

How does this song fit into the plot of Yennai Arindhaal?

This song captures a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the protagonist's emotional journey.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Chinmayi.

Who composed the music for Idhayathai Yedho Ondru?

The music for this song was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was Yennai Arindhaal released?

The movie was released on January 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Idhayathai Yedho Ondru, the protagonist navigates the intricate emotions of love and longing, beautifully portrayed through Chinmayi's captivating vocals. The song serves as a poignant reflection of the character's inner turmoil and desire, resonating with anyone who has experienced similar feelings. The soothing melody, composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, enhances the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in the film Yennai Arindhaal. This track not only elevates the narrative but also evokes a sense of nostalgia and yearning.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Idhayathai Yedho Ondru from the film Yennai Arindhaal, where Chinmayi's soulful voice beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. This collaboration with the talented music director Harrish Jeyaraj and lyricist Thamarai creates a mesmerizing auditory experience that resonates deeply with listeners. Dive into the emotional depths of this melodious track that perfectly complements the film's narrative.
stanzaMeanings: Something is stirring in my heart today, but until now, I have not felt this way.
Like the waves of the sea, something is coming, but my heart has not yet received it.
This heart that exists until now, it belongs to me. I have seen it go away from me.
This is a dream state; I do not wish to change it. In the dream, I see myself as a dream.
Listen to one word that tells me what I need. From now on, you and I are one, whatever the day may say.
Flowers come and bring joy, handing over to my hands. My heart is divided, and I am filled with desire.
What is it that troubles me today? My heart is restless. Like a leaf in the river, I will flow away.
Worries will become a beautiful change. A thousand will become a beautiful blessing.
Like a silver anklet, this heart is tender below. Like an unbreakable gem, a new feeling shines above.
Something is stirring in my heart today, but until now, I have not felt this way.
Like the waves of the sea, something is coming, but my heart has not yet received it.
This heart that exists until now, it belongs to me. I have seen it go away from me.
This is a dream state; I do not wish to change it. In the dream, I see myself as a dream.
Like a silver anklet, this heart is tender below. Like an unbreakable gem, a new feeling shines above.
